sample_title: Demodex folliculorum strain MAP, isolated from the nose area of Dr. M. Alejandra Perotti
description: Given the low quantity of individuals (and thus expected DNA quantity) obtained in each collection, 6 independent Whole-genome amplification reactions using the GenomiPhi V2 DNA Amplification Kit (Illustra) were performed and then mixed together.
